signals.headline: South Korea** angles show Bank of Korea monitoring Fed moves amid won weakness (at 1,457/USD) and potential rate freeze/
signals.raw:
South Korea** angles show Bank of Korea monitoring Fed moves amid won weakness (at 1,457/USD) and potential rate freeze/hike, but no new policy actions confirmed; trade talks ended without breakthrough.[2][3]

Warsh's background as former Fed Governor emphasizes inflation control, but his chairmanship succession by mid-May remains assumed, not finalized.[1][4]
